summary: Documented that Owlory local user data is scoped to the installed app identity and local Application Support container, while GitHub/Xcode mirroring and Build Info prove source/build identity rather than data-store identity.
recommended_next_reason: Only consider this if intentional data movement between TestFlight, Xcode-dev, simulator, or device installs becomes a product requirement.

contract_status_changes.contract: Legacy handoff schema backfill for document-local-data-channel-boundaries
contract_status_changes.before: Legacy handoff predated explicit proof, residual risk, repo cleanliness, and mirror status fields.
contract_status_changes.after: Backfilled only from the existing handoff summary, validation trail, and recorded risks; product history and proof claims were not upgraded beyond the evidence.

residual_risks: This is a docs-only contract. No export/import, migration, app-group storage move, or sync behavior was implemented.
The main app data store still intentionally remains local to the installed app container.
